message.content:
In the project at /Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub, find:
1. The landing page hero section component that contains "Stop Wasting Time on Manual Work" and "Let AI Handle It" text
2. The pricing page/component that shows pricing cards
3. Any footer or social media component that has Twitter/X icon
4. Any i18n/translation files

Return file paths and relevant line numbers for each finding.

content.text: I'll help you find these components in the project. Let me search for them systematically.

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile the final report. ## Summary of Findings I've successfully located all four components you requested in the project. Here's the detailed information: ### 1. Landing Page Hero Section with "Stop Wasting Time on Manual Work" and "Let AI Handle It" **File:** `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/pages/LandingPage.js` **Lines:** 723-728 The hero section is part of the CTA (Call-to-Action) component: ```javascript

{t('landing.cta.title', { defaultValue: 'Stop Wasting Time on Manual Work.' })}{' '} {t('landing.cta.titleHighlight', { defaultValue: 'Let AI Handle It.' })}

``` This appears in **Section 8** of the landing page (lines 714-747), which is the final CTA full-width section before WhatsApp popup. --- ### 2. Pricing Page/Component with Pricing Cards **File:** `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/pages/PricingPage.js` **Key Sections:** - **Plan Metadata:** Lines 11-16 (4 pricing tiers: free, grow, scale, evolution) - **Pricing Cards Rendering:** Lines 151-231 (main plans grid with 4 columns) - **Plan Card Component:** Lines 158-230 (renders individual pricing cards with features, locked items, CTAs) - **Comparison Table:** Lines 283-319 (full feature comparison across plans) - **N8n Add-on Section:** Lines 234-280 (additional paid add-on) The pricing cards display in a 4-column grid with: - Plan name and description - Price in euros per month - Feature list - CTA buttons (Subscribe/Current Plan/Downgrade) - Badge indicators for featured/current plans --- ### 3. Footer Component with Twitter/X Icon **File:** `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/components/Footer.js` **Line:** 20 ```javascript 𝕏 ``` The Twitter/X social link is in the **footer__brand section** (lines 13-28), using the Unicode character `𝕏` (Mathematical Alphanumeric Symbols U+1D54F) as the icon. Additional social links include: - **LinkedIn:** Line 21 (text "in") - **Instagram:** Lines 22-26 (SVG icon) --- ### 4. i18n/Translation Files **Main i18n Configuration File:** `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/i18n/i18n.js` **Translation Resource Files:** - `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/i18n/en.json` (English) - `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/i18n/es.json` (Spanish) - `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/i18n/fr.json` (French) - `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/i18n/de.json` (German) - `/Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub/src/i18n/it.json` (Italian) **Example translation entries** (from en.json, lines 186-187): ```json "landing.cta.title": "Stop Wasting Time on Manual Work.", "landing.cta.titleHighlight": "Let AI Handle It.", ``` The i18n setup uses **react-i18next** library with 5 supported languages. The configuration initializes all language resources and sets English as the fallback language.
